title.en: It is because of these two horns that it is cal...

content.en:
Soon, Ye Tian stood in front of the natural formation, and his eyes saw the cub inside through the natural formation.

The cub looks like a giant panda, the same black and white, but more rounded, as if it were a very fat panda.

The only difference is that the two-horned round bear cub has two tiny horns on its forehead, one black and one white.

It is because of these two horns that it is called the two-horned round bear.

Although the two-horned round bear looks cute and stupid on the outside, this is not an ordinary source beast, but a sixth-order life.

"Judging from the breath, the cultivation of this two-horned round bear cub is not high, it is only a high-level source beast, but with the life level of a sixth-order life, it is enough to rival the weaker source king!"

Ye Tian judged.

He didn't immediately enter this natural formation, but was probing the surrounding situation, he didn't dare to guarantee that there were no other powerful source beasts in the vicinity, in case the parents of this two-horned bear cub were nearby, wouldn't he be looking for death if he went in like this?

"Be careful!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Next, Ye Tian waited silently nearby, and kept probing, but he didn't find a powerful source beast.

He even sent a clone to touch this natural formation, and nothing unusual happened.

After making sure that there was no danger, Ye Tian entered the natural formation.

As soon as he entered the natural formation, the two-horned round bear cub stared at Ye Tian with big round eyes, his eyes full of curiosity.

"Little one, is it okay to mess with me?"

Ye Tian asked.

It seems that he is too young, and the wisdom of the two-horned round bear cub is not high, so he did not reply to Ye Tian, but looked at Ye Tian stupidly.

Ye Tian also knew that the source beasts of the origin realm were generally very low, so it was not surprising, so he used his strength to restrain the two-horned round bear cub and left here immediately.

What if the parents of the two-horned bear cub just went out and came back?

Therefore, it is undoubtedly the most reliable way to take the two-horned bear cub directly, once you get away from here, even if the parents of the two-horned bear cub are not dead and return here, you will not be able to find him.

----------

A day later.

Ye Tian landed on a mountain peak, opened a temporary cave, and began to study the two-horned round bear cubs.

Of course, the main thing is to study the bloodline of the two-horned round bear cubs.

Through his research, he discovered that the blood of the two-horned bear cub contained a trace of ancestral breath.

It turned out that the two-horned bear cub was indeed the original cub.

Sixth-order life plus the Origin Ancestor cub, this value is far from comparable to the Nine-Colored Divine Cow, and it can even be said that ten Nine-Colored Divine Cows are far less than a two-horned round bear cub.

"Sent it, if I treat this two-horned round bear cub as a war pet, I can bring it out of the Origin Realm, then in the future, it will be equivalent to having a supreme-level war pet, and it is also a supreme-level war pet comparable to the Lord of the Ancient Dollar or even more than the Lord of the Ancient Age. This war pet alone is enough to protect the human race!" Ye Tian said excitedly.

Immediately, he couldn't wait to collect the two-horned bear cub as a war pet.

In the universe, there are many secret techniques for collecting war pets, and Ye Tian will naturally have some secret techniques for collecting war pets.

So, he began to use secret magic to make a pact with the two-horned bear cub.

A few days later, Ye Tian successfully concluded a contract with the two-horned bear cub and officially became the owner of the two-horned bear cub.

"The wisdom of the two-horned round bear cub is too low, there are many treasures in the universe that can increase wisdom, I also have some on me, take out some for the two-horned round bear cub!"

Ye Tian fed the extremely precious elixir treasures to the two-horned round bear cubs.

After taking a large amount of elixir treasures, the wisdom of the two-horned round bear cub slowly increased.

A month later.

The two-horned round bear cub looked at Ye Tian, and a voice came into Ye Tian's mind: "Master!"

"Little guy, I'll give you a name, it's called Xiao Yuanyuan, how about it?"

Ye Tian said with a smile.

"Thank you master, Xiao Yuanyuan likes this name very much!"

The cubs of the two-horned round bear roll around, indicating that they are very happy.

"You enter my small universe Chaos Ancient Realm to cultivate, you are too weak now to help me!"

As he spoke, Ye Tian threw Xiao Yuanyuan into the small universe, and passed on some cultivation methods to Xiao Yuanyuan by the way, so that Xiao Yuanyuan could cultivate himself and accelerate his growth.

Next, Ye Tian searched for all kinds of treasures at will in the Origin Realm.

It can be said that many treasures in the Origin Realm are suitable for the growth of Source Beasts, so Ye Tian threw all these treasures to Xiao Yuanyuan.

After getting so many treasures, Xiao Yuanyuan was very happy, and he cultivated even harder.

At the same time, Ye Tian was also constantly exploring the ability of the Life Heavenly Pupil, and making full use of the ability of the Life Heavenly Pupil.

Now, Ye Tian used the ability of the Life Heavenly Pupil to not only probe the life breath of other creatures, but also combine it with the space-time talent to detect the situation of a certain creature.

For example, the Life Heavenly Pupil detected a breath of life far away, and then used the super-god-level space-time talent to spread along the location locked by the Life Heavenly Pupil, so as to detect the situation of that creature, just like the situation detected by the divine sense.

And because the location is too far away, the other party has no way to detect Ye Tian's situation, so this is definitely the best way to spy on it.

In this way, Ye Tian not only knew the level of those life breaths, but also knew what kind of creatures they were and what the situation was nearby, so that he would not have to worry about his safety.

In this way, Ye Tian probed the situation of the source beasts one by one every day, and sometimes he would detect the location of the source ancestor, and he would be sensed by the source ancestor, but the other party could only attack around frantically, but he didn't know his location.

......

Origin Realm, One-Eyed Tyrant Wolf Mountain Range.

This is the territory of the one-eyed wolf, and the one-eyed wolf is the family of the source king, the one-eyed wolf can become the source king when he is an adult, and the best of them can even become the source emperor, and the strength of the patriarch is comparable to the top source emperor.

The number of the entire one-eyed wolf clan is as high as tens of thousands, and the affiliated races are as many as hundreds of thousands, so even a source emperor would not dare to come to the one-eyed wolf mountain range to cause trouble.

And this day.

A figure shuttled through space and dived into the One-Eyed Wolf Mountain Range.

This person is Ye Tian.

"There are a lot of one-eyed wolf clans, but without the Source Emperor, even if I am exposed, they will not be able to keep me. This clan should have accumulated a lot of treasures, and if they were all stolen, it would definitely be a big profit!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

He has done this kind of thing more than once, and along the way, he has stolen the property of several source beast clans, which is worth a lot of money, and it is an extremely rare treasure in the outside world!

And the source beast clan that he stole before was not strong, far inferior to the one-eyed wolf clan, he was very curious, how much property the one-eyed wolf clan had.

"Hope you don't let me down!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Immediately, he continued to dive in, and finally penetrated deep into the One-Eyed Wolf Mountain Range.
